name: @sciforge/project-dag
description: Project DAG compiler: merges per-thread evidence DAGs into one goal-oriented, bi-temporal project graph with a review queue, weekly report and time-machine audit view. HTTP service (ServiceResult-only).

sciforge.packagingStrategy: Python sidecar (stdlib + networkx, requires-python >=3.10). `npm run start` installs the sibling evidence-dag package editable (imported as a library) then runs `python -m project_dag.server` on :3898. The desktop app reaches it over HTTP only (SCIFORGE_PROJECT_DAG_SERVICE_URL) through the package desktop sidecar modules. LLM calls use only Model Router env (EDAG_MODEL_ROUTER_*); ship src/ + ui/ + desktop/ + samples/ + pyproject.toml.
